_comment: LOCAL DEV CONFIG - local docker multicluster stack via relay transport. relayUrl port matches docker-compose.multicluster.yaml relay http mapping (8081). clusters[] drives the cluster picker; identity + relayUrl are shared. NOTE: the PUBLIC AWS demo gives each cluster an INDEPENDENT agentPrivateKey (each nhp-server trusts only its own); this local stack intentionally reuses ONE agent key across both clusters so docker/multicluster/nhp-server-c2 can e2e-knock without a second trusted key. The per-cluster agentPrivateKey fields below are present so the picker's key-swap path is exercised locally too.
